records.question: Which reports for the Henry River South project target exactly BASE METALS,COPPER and have operators as AUSTRALIAN ORES & MINERALS LTD with no more than 362 samples in geo_chemistry?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT wamex_reports.anumber FROM wamex_reports
JOIN geo_chemistry ON wamex_reports.anumber = geo_chemistry.anumber
JOIN historic_titles ON wamex_reports.anumber = historic_titles.anumber
WHERE wamex_reports.operators = 'AUSTRALIAN ORES & MINERALS LTD' AND geo_chemistry.numberofsamples <= 362 AND wamex_reports.targetcommoditiesnames = 'BASE METALS,COPPER' AND wamex_reports.projectname = 'Henry River South'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT wamex_reports.anumber
FROM wamex_reports
JOIN geo_chemistry ON wamex_reports.anumber = geo_chemistry.anumber
WHERE wamex_reports.projectname = 'Henry River South'
  AND wamex_reports.targetcommoditiesnames = 'BASE METALS,COPPER'
  AND wamex_reports.operators = 'AUSTRALIAN ORES & MINERALS LTD'
  AND geo_chemistry.numberofsamples <= 362

WHERE wamex_reports.reportdate <= '1984-02-29' AND wamex_reports.targetcommoditiesnames = 'GOLD' AND wamex_reports.authornames = 'WILSON M R' AND geo_chemistry.sampletype = 'Channel Samples' AND drilling_summaries.numberofholes = 1 AND wamex_reports.operators = 'CENTRAL KALGOORLIE GOLD MINES NL' AND wamex_reports.projectname = 'Hidden Secret' AND wamex_reports.keywords LIKE '%RC drilling%'

JOIN drilling_summaries ds ON wr.anumber = ds.anumber
JOIN geo_chemistry gc ON wr.anumber = gc.anumber

  AND wr.operators = 'CENTRAL KALGOORLIE GOLD MINES NL'
  AND wr.authornames = 'WILSON M R'
  AND wr.targetcommoditiesnames = 'GOLD'

SELECT wamex_reports.anumber FROM wamex_reports
JOIN abstracts ON wamex_reports.anumber = abstracts.anumber
WHERE wamex_reports.reportdate <= '2018-03-12' AND wamex_reports.confidentiality = 'OPEN FILE' AND wamex_reports.projectname = 'Lignum Dam' AND wamex_reports.keywords LIKE '%Moving loop EM surveys%' AND wamex_reports.operators = 'MITHRIL RESOURCES LTD' AND wamex_reports.targetcommoditiesnames = 'BASE METALS,GOLD'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT wamex_reports.anumber
FROM wamex_reports
WHERE projectname = 'Lignum Dam'
  AND operators = 'MITHRIL RESOURCES LTD'
  AND confidentiality = 'Open File'
  AND reportdate <= '2018-03-12'
  AND keywords LIKE '%Moving loop EM surveys%'
  AND targetcommoditiesnames = 'BASE METALS,GOLD'

records.question: Which reports from the Erayinia North project, operated by BLACK RAVEN MINING, target GOLD,ZINC,LEAD,COPPER, are open file, include Aeromagnetics surveys, and have a report date on or after 2021-04-20?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT wamex_reports.anumber FROM wamex_reports
JOIN abstracts ON wamex_reports.anumber = abstracts.anumber
JOIN survey_reports ON wamex_reports.anumber = survey_reports.anumber
JOIN geo_chemistry ON wamex_reports.anumber = geo_chemistry.anumber
WHERE wamex_reports.projectname = 'Erayinia North' AND wamex_reports.targetcommoditiesnames = 'GOLD,ZINC,LEAD,COPPER' AND wamex_reports.reportdate >= '2021-04-20' AND wamex_reports.operators = 'BLACK RAVEN MINING' AND survey_reports.surveytype = 'Aeromagnetics' AND wamex_reports.confidentiality = 'OPEN FILE'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT wamex_reports.anumber
FROM wamex_reports
JOIN survey_reports ON wamex_reports.anumber = survey_reports.anumber
WHERE wamex_reports.projectname = 'Erayinia North'
  AND wamex_reports.operators LIKE '%BLACK RAVEN MINING%'
  AND (
    wamex_reports.targetcommoditiesnames LIKE '%GOLD%'
    AND wamex_reports.targetcommoditiesnames LIKE '%ZINC%'
    AND wamex_reports.targetcommoditiesnames LIKE '%LEAD%'
    AND wamex_reports.targetcommoditiesnames LIKE '%COPPER%'
  )
  AND wamex_reports.confidentiality = 'Open File'
  AND survey_reports.surveytype LIKE '%Aeromagnetics%'
  AND wamex_reports.reportdate >= '2021-04-20'

records.question: Which wamex_reports entities operated by 'METALS EXPLORATION LTD' have related drilling_summaries, abstracts, storages with a volume of at least 3.0, and geo_chemistry records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT wamex_reports.anumber FROM wamex_reports
JOIN drilling_summaries ON wamex_reports.anumber = drilling_summaries.anumber
JOIN abstracts ON wamex_reports.anumber = abstracts.anumber
JOIN storages ON wamex_reports.anumber = storages.anumber
JOIN geo_chemistry ON wamex_reports.anumber = geo_chemistry.anumber
WHERE wamex_reports.operators = 'METALS EXPLORATION LTD' AND storages.volume >= 3.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT wr.anumber
FROM wamex_reports wr
JOIN drilling_summaries ds ON wr.anumber = ds.anumber
JOIN abstracts ab ON wr.anumber = ab.anumber
JOIN storages st ON wr.anumber = st.anumber AND st.volume >= 3.0
JOIN geo_chemistry gc ON wr.anumber = gc.anumber
WHERE wr.operators = 'METALS EXPLORATION LTD'

records.gold_sql:
SELECT wamex_reports.anumber FROM wamex_reports
JOIN abstracts ON wamex_reports.anumber = abstracts.anumber
JOIN documents ON wamex_reports.anumber = documents.anumber

WHERE documents.filetype = '.pdf' AND wamex_reports.confidentiality = 'OPEN FILE' AND wamex_reports.operators = 'NEWMONT AUSTRALIA LTD' AND wamex_reports.reportdate = '1988-12-31' AND wamex_reports.targetcommoditiesnames = 'GOLD' AND wamex_reports.keywords LIKE '%Rotary drilling%'

JOIN documents ON wamex_reports.anumber = documents.anumber
WHERE wamex_reports.operators = 'NEWMONT AUSTRALIA LTD'
  AND wamex_reports.reportdate = '1988-12-31'
  AND wamex_reports.targetcommoditiesnames LIKE '%GOLD%'
  AND wamex_reports.confidentiality = 'OPEN FILE'

records.question: Which wamex reports operated by BROKEN HILL PTY CO LTD target COPPER,ZINC, have reports dated on or after 1973-12-31, include at least 20 drilled holes totaling exactly 1312 meters, feature aeromagnetic/radiometric surveys, and contain soil samples with at least 7914 numberofsamples?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT wamex_reports.anumber FROM wamex_reports
JOIN drilling_summaries ON wamex_reports.anumber = drilling_summaries.anumber
JOIN survey_reports ON wamex_reports.anumber = survey_reports.anumber
JOIN geo_chemistry ON wamex_reports.anumber = geo_chemistry.anumber
JOIN historic_titles ON wamex_reports.anumber = historic_titles.anumber
WHERE geo_chemistry.numberofsamples >= 7914 AND wamex_reports.operators = 'BROKEN HILL PTY CO LTD' AND drilling_summaries.totaldrilled = 1312 AND wamex_reports.reportdate >= '1973-12-31' AND survey_reports.surveytype = 'aeromagnetic/radiometric' AND geo_chemistry.sampletype = 'soil samples' AND drilling_summaries.numberofholes >= 20 AND wamex_reports.targetcommoditiesnames = 'COPPER,ZINC'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT wr.anumber
FROM wamex_reports wr
JOIN drilling_summaries ds ON wr.anumber = ds.anumber
JOIN survey_reports sr ON wr.anumber = sr.anumber
JOIN geo_chemistry gc ON wr.anumber = gc.anumber
WHERE wr.operators LIKE '%BROKEN HILL PTY CO LTD%'
  AND (
    (',' || UPPER(wr.targetcommoditiesnames) || ',') LIKE '%,COPPER,%'
    AND (',' || UPPER(wr.targetcommoditiesnames) || ',') LIKE '%,ZINC,%'
  )
  AND wr.reportdate >= '1973-12-31'
  AND ds.numberofholes >= 20
  AND ds.totaldrilled = 1312
  AND (
    LOWER(sr.surveytype) LIKE '%aeromagnetic%'
    OR LOWER(sr.surveytype) LIKE '%radiometric%'
  )
  AND LOWER(gc.sampletype) = 'soil'
  AND gc.numberofsamples >= 7914
GROUP BY wr.anumber
